user_query:
I need a local Ethereum fork with Uniswap and real pool state for a live demo. Read input/config.json for parameters (forkFrom: "ethereum", blockNumber: 19234567, fundedAccounts: 5, seedLiquidity: true, port: 8547) and start the environment accordingly. Then produce the following files:

1) Write a machine-readable summary to output/testnet_summary.json with exactly these top-level fields and types:
- rpc_url (string, e.g., "http://127.0.0.1:8547")
- chain_id (number)
- mode (string)
- fork_from (string)
- block_number (number)
- funded_accounts (array of 5 objects), where each object contains:
  • index (number 1..5)
  • address (0x-prefixed 40-hex address)
  • private_key (0x-prefixed 64-hex key)
  • balances (object) with exactly: ETH, USDC, USDT, DAI, WETH, UNI
    - ETH: 10000
    - USDC: 1000000
    - USDT: 1000000
    - DAI: 10000
    - WETH: 100
    - UNI: 10000
- contracts (object) with exactly these keys and their expected mainnet addresses:
  • V3Factory: 0x1F98431c8aD98523631AE4a59f267346ea31F984
  • NonfungiblePositionManager: 0xC36442b4a4522E871399CD717aBDD847Ab11FE88
  • UniversalRouter: 0x3fC91A3afd70395Cd496C647d5a6CC9D4B2b7FAD
  • Permit2: 0x000000000022D473030F116dDEE9F6B43aC78BA3
  • QuoterV2: 0x61fFE014bA17989E743c5F6cB21bF9697530B21e
- available_pools (array) that includes at least these two entries with their addresses:
  • { pair: "USDC/WETH", fee: "0.05%", address: "0x88e6A0c2dDD26FEEb64F039a2c41296FcB3f5640" }
  • { pair: "USDC/WETH", fee: "0.30%", address: "0x8ad599c3A0ff1De082011EFDDc58f1908eb6e6D8" }

2) Write output/rpc_url.txt that contains only the RPC URL (same value as rpc_url in the JSON).

3) Write output/README.md with a clear human-readable summary that includes:
- A short "Local Testnet Ready" section
- Chain ID and block number used
- A list or table of the 5 funded accounts and their balances
- The key contract addresses listed above
- At least two available pool examples
- An explicit warning that these are test-only keys and must never be used on mainnet
- A "Next Steps:" section with at least three actionable bullets relevant to swaps or LP testing (e.g., creating a pool, advancing time, getting a quote, funding tokens, configuring a wallet)

Please ensure the outputs reflect a fork of Ethereum at block 19,234,567 with 5 funded accounts and seeded liquidity. Put all artifacts only under output/.
